explanations.6: This checks if the folder doesn't exist (the ! means 'not'), and if so, prints a red error message and exits the script early using 'return 0'.
explanations.7: Same logic as line 6, but checking the second folder path instead.
explanations.9: The \033[1;34m part is ANSI color code that makes the text blue; \033[0m turns off the color formatting.
explanations.11: This changes into the source folder (pushd), runs a diff command to compare files, then changes back out (popd); the '> /dev/null' hides the folder navigation messages from the user, and LC_ALL=C makes diff use a standard sorting order.
